summary: MET 30/09/2026 3.00% Metlifecar represents a fixed-income security issued by Metlifecare, a retirement village operator in New Zealand. It offers a coupon rate of 3.00% and matures on September 30, 2026. The issuer is Metlifecare.

name: My Food Bag Group Limited
summary: My Food Bag Group Limited engages in online meal kit and pre-prepared ready to heat meal delivery business in New Zealand. It offers a range of meal kit bags under the My Food Bag, Bargain Box, Fresh Start, and MADE by My Food Bag brands. The company was formerly known as MFB Group Limited and changed its name My Food Bag Group Limited in January 2021. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Mainfreight Ltd.
summary: Mainfreight Limited provides supply chain logistics solutions in New Zealand, Australia, the Americas, Asia, and Europe. It provides warehousing, domestic freight forwarding, and international air and ocean freight forwarding services. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Michael Hill International Limited
summary: Michael Hill International Limited owns and operates retail jewelry stores, and provides related services in Australia, New Zeeland, and Canada. The company operates its stores under the Michael Hill and Emma & Roe brand names. Its stores offer bracelets and bangles, earrings, pendants and necklaces, rings, chains, watches, gifts, and collections, as well as birthstones. As of June 30, 2019, Michael Hill International Limited operated 306 stores, including 305 Michael Hill stores and 1 Emma & Roe stores. It also offers professional care plans and in-house customer finance services; and operates Michael Hill and Emma & Roe e-commerce sites. The company was formerly known as Michael Hill New Zealand Limited and changed its name to Michael Hill International Limited in July 2016. Michael Hill International Limited was founded in 1979 and is based in Murarrie, Australia.

name: MHM Automation Limited
summary: MHM Automation Limited, together with its subsidiaries, designs and supplies automated systems and equipment for the food processing and logistics sectors in New Zealand and Australia. The company designs and fabricates stainless steel and associated equipment for industrial, dairy, wine, and food sectors; and sells and services specialized food cutting equipment. It also designs, manufactures, delivers, and services automated handling systems primarily for the food sector; and designs, manufactures, and installs chilling and freezing tunnels, and plate freezing systems to the food industry, as well as offers related services, spare parts, and support. In addition, the company develops and commercializes S-clave, a patented system for the sterilization of medical equipment in a non-porous container system. The company was formerly known as Mercer Group Limited. MHM Automation Limited was founded in 1884 and is based in Christchurch, New Zealand.

name: Marlin Global Limited
summary: Marlin Global Limited is an investment company focused on investing in a portfolio of global equities. It provides investors with access to a diversified range of international shares. The company is based in New Zealand.

name: Marsden Maritime Holdings Limited
summary: Marsden Maritime Holdings Limited operates a deep water port facility in the Greater Marsden Point Area, New Zealand. The company operates through three segments: Port Related Operations, Property Holdings, and Marina and Commercial. It also provides 185 hectares of industrial land for lease; operates farmland at Marsden Point; and owns and operates the Marsden Cove marina complex, which consists of a 229 berth marina, commercial complex, and boatyard facility. The company was formerly known as Northland Port Corporation (NZ) Limited and changed its name to Marsden Maritime Holdings Limited in August 2014. Marsden Maritime Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1988 and is based in Ruakaka, New Zealand.

name: Metro Performance Glass Limited
summary: Metro Performance Glass Limited, together with its subsidiaries, supplies processed flat glass and related products for the residential and commercial building sectors in New Zealand and Australia. Its glass products include splashbacks, benchtops, and kitchen doors and mirrors; and bathroom mirrors, inline showers, two and three sided showers, bath end showers, bath screens, shower linings, and shower and screen hardware. The company also offers interior balustrades, stairs and floors, room dividers, mirrors, wall linings, doors, and furniture; and exterior balustrades, pool fences, wind breaks, glass canopies, glass features, outdoor furniture, and balustrade and pool fence hardware. In addition, it provides installation services. Metro Performance Glass Limited was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Marlborough Wine Estates Group Limited
summary: Marlborough Wine Estates Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the wine industry in New Zealand, the United States, China, and internationally. It owns and operates 6 vineyard blocks comprising approximately 336 hectares located in the Awatere Valley in Marlborough; produces and sells grapes; and produces, sells, and markets wine under the O:TU and Music Bay brand names. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Napier Port Holdings Limited
summary: Napier Port Holdings Limited provides various port services in the Napier Port. It offers marine, general cargo, container, port pack, and depot services. The company was founded in 1875 and is based in Napier, New Zealand. Napier Port Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Hawke's Bay Regional Investment Company Limited.

name: New Talisman Gold Mines Limited
summary: New Talisman Gold Mines Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the mine development and mineral exploration activities in New Zealand. It primarily explores for gold and silver deposits. The company holds a 100% interest in the Talisman gold project in the Hauraki Gold Field, as well as the Rahu project located in New Zealand. It is also involved in the share investment activity. New Talisman Gold Mines Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: NZ Windfarms Limited
summary: NZ Windfarms Limited generates and sells electricity to the national grid in New Zealand. It operates the Te Rere Hau wind farm, a 48.5 megawatts wind farm located in the North Range road in the Taraua Ranges. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Palmerston North, New Zealand.

name: NZ Automotive Investments Limited
summary: NZ Automotive Investments Limited, through its subsidiaries, operates in the automotive retail and vehicle finance businesses in New Zealand. It sells used vehicles through 12 car dealerships operated under the 2 Cheap Cars brand in New Zealand; and offers secured car loans under the NZ Motor Finance brand. The company was formerly known as 2CC Holdings Limited and changed its name to NZ Automotive Investments Limited in November 2020. NZ Automotive Investments Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Mt Wellington, New Zealand.

name: New Zealand King Salmon Investments Limited
summary: New Zealand King Salmon Investments Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the farming, processing, and sale of premium salmon products. It offers whole fish, fillets, steaks, portions, wood roasted, cold smoked, and other products. The company sells its products to chefs, retailers, and wholesalers under the Ora King, Regal, Southern Ocean, Big Catch Salmon Burley, and Omega Plus brands, as well as the New Zealand King Salmon label. It serves customers in New Zealand, China, North America, Australia, Japan, Europe, and internationally. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Nelson, New Zealand.

name: New Zealand Rural Land Company Limited
summary: New Zealand Rural Land Company Limited focuses on investing and acquiring rural land across the New Zealand agricultural sector. It owns the land and provide a platform for farmers and food producers. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: NZME Limited
summary: NZME Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated media and entertainment company in New Zealand. It offers its products through 32 print publications, 9 radio channels, and 19 real estate publications, as well as websites. The company was formerly known as Wilson & Horton Limited. NZME Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: New Zealand Oil & Gas Limited
summary: New Zealand Oil & Gas Limited engages in the production, exploration, evaluation, and appraisal of oil and gas properties. It operates through Kupe Oil and Gas Field (Kupe), Oil & Gas Exploration, and Cue Energy Resources Limited segments. The company develops, produces, and sells natural gas, liquefied petroleum gas, and condensate. Its principal producing asset is the Kupe gas and light oil/condensate field located in Taranaki, New Zealand. The company also holds an interest in the Sampang PSC with 2 producing fields, including Oyong oil and gas field, and Wortel gas field covering an area of approximately 536 square-kilometers situated in the Madura Straight offshore Madura Island in East Java, Indonesia; Mahato PSC covering an area of 5,600 square kilometer located in the Central Sumatra basin; and Mahakam Hilir PSC covering an area of 344 square-kilometers situated in the Kutei Basin onshore Kalimantan, Indonesia. In addition, the company engages in the exploration and evaluation of hydrocarbons in the offshore Taranaki basin and offshore Canterbury basin, New Zealand, Australia, and Indonesia. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Wellington, New Zealand. New Zealand Oil & Gas Limited is a subsidiary of O.G. Oil & Gas Singapore Pte. Ltd.

name: The New Zealand Refining Company Limited
summary: The New Zealand Refining Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the refining of crude oil and supply of refined petroleum products in New Zealand. The company operates through Oil Refining, Distribution, and Other segments. It produces petrol, diesel, aviation fuel, kerosene, fuel oils, and bitumen, as well as offers specialized fuels, biofuels, and industrial and environmental laboratory testing services. The company also owns and operates a 170-kilometre pipeline that transports refined fuels running from the refinery at Marsden Point to Wiri located in South Auckland. The New Zealand Refining Company Limited was founded in 1961 and is based in Whangarei, New Zealand.

name: NZX Limited
summary: NZX Limited operates a stock exchange in New Zealand. The company operates through five segments: Issuer Relationships, Secondary Markets, Data & Insights, Funds Management, and Wealth Technologies. The Issuer Relationships segment provides issuer services for current and prospective customers and market operator for Fonterra Co-Operative Group and the Electricity Authority. The Secondary Markets provides trading and post-trade services for securities and derivatives markets, as well as provides central securities depository; and market operator for Fonterra Co-Operative Group, the Electricity Authority, and the Ministry for the Environment. The Data & Insights segment offers information services for the securities and derivatives markets; and analysis for New Zealand's dairy sector. The Funds Management segment provides superannuation and KiwiSaver, and Smartshares exchange traded funds. The Wealth Technologies segment offers funds administration and custodian services. It also offers virtualTrading, a virtual platform for people to learn about key investing concepts by actively trading virtual securities. NZX Limited was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Wellington, New Zealand.

name: Oceania Healthcare Limited
summary: Oceania Healthcare Limited owns and operates various retirement village and aged care centers in New Zealand. The company operates through three segments: Care Operations, Village Operations, and Other. It provides rest home, hospital, dementia, respite, and palliative and end of life care centers; and boutique villages. The company was formerly known as Retirement Care (NZ) Limited and changed its name to Oceania Healthcare Limited in September 2014. Oceania Healthcare Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Precinct Properties New Zealand Limited
summary: Precinct is New Zealand's only listed city centre specialist investing predominately in premium and A-grade commercial office property. Listed on the NZX Main Board, PCT currently owns Auckland's PwC Tower, AMP Centre, ANZ Centre (50%), Jarden House, HSBC House, Mason Bros. Building, 12 Madden Street, 10 Madden Street and Commercial Bay; and Wellington's AON Centre, NTT Tower, No. 1 and No. 3 The Terrace, Mayfair House and Bowen Campus. Precinct owns Generator NZ, New Zealand's premier flexible office space provider. Generator currently offers 13,600 square metres of space across four locations in Auckland.

name: Precinct Properties New Zealand Limited 5.54% NTS 17/12/21 NZD5000
summary: Precinct Properties New Zealand Limited is a property investment company focused on owning, developing, and managing premium commercial properties in New Zealand. The company's portfolio includes office buildings, retail spaces, and mixed-use developments, primarily in Auckland and Wellington. Precinct Properties aims to deliver long-term value to shareholders through strategic property investments and active asset management.

name: Pacific Edge Limited
summary: Pacific Edge Limited, a cancer diagnostic company, researches, develops, and commercializes diagnostic and prognostic tools for the early detection and management of cancers in New Zealand, the United States, and internationally. It operates in two segments, Commercial and Research. The company offers Cxbladder, a genomic urine tests for the detection and management of bladder cancer. It is also developing Cxbladder Resolve, a product designed to identify high grade or late stage bladder cancer and provide increased clinical resolution; and Cxcolorectal (prognosis Gen II), a prognostic gene signature for patients diagnosed with stage II or stage III colorectal cancers, which are in clinical and user trials. In addition, the company is developing products for gastric, melanoma, and endometrial cancers, which are in pre-clinical trials. Pacific Edge Limited was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Dunedin, New Zealand.

name: Property For Industry Limited
summary: Property For Industry Limited engages in the property investment and management business in New Zealand. The company invests in industrial properties located in North Harbour, Avondale, Penrose, Mount Wellington, Manukau, Mangere, East Tamaki, Wellington, and Christchurch. As of December 23, 2020, it operated a portfolio of 94 properties that are leased to 147 tenants. Property For Industry Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Property For Industry Limited 4.59% BDS 28/11/2024 NZD5000
summary: Property For Industry Limited is a New Zealand-based property investment company focused on owning and managing industrial properties. The company's portfolio consists of warehouses, factories, and logistics facilities leased to a diverse range of tenants. Property For Industry aims to provide investors with a stable income stream and long-term capital growth through its industrial property investments.

name: PGG Wrightson Limited
summary: PGG Wrightson Limited provides goods and services for agricultural sector in New Zealand. The company operates in two segments, Agency, and Retail & Water. It operates rural supplies stores that offer a range of products in various categories, such as fencing, agricultural chemicals, animal health, animal equipment and handling, clothing, fertilizer, home and garden, machinery, animal feed and nutrition, seeds, water and irrigation, horticulture, pet supplies, safety equipment, and dairy shed supplies. The company also provides agency services for the sale, purchase, and service of livestock through auction, private and on-farm sales, and online trading of livestock; irrigation and water services to farmers and horticulturists; and markets and exports wool products. In addition, it offers insurance products; fruit fed supplies; and rural supplies, as well as farm maintenance, soil and crop nutrition, and plant and soil testing. Further, the company provides real estate services, including rural, lifestyle, residential, and commercial properties. PGG Wrightson Limited was founded in 1841 and is based in Christchurch, New Zealand.

name: Promisia Healthcare Limited
summary: Promisia Healthcare Limited provides healthcare services in New Zealand. It operates three aged care facilities. The company was formerly known as Promisia Integrative Limited and changed its name to Promisia Healthcare Limited in February 2021. Promisia Healthcare Limited was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Wellington, New Zealand.

name: Private Land And Property Fund
summary: The Private Land and Property Fund invests in private land and property assets in New Zealand. It aims to provide investors with access to this asset class, generating returns through rental income and capital appreciation. The fund is managed by an experienced investment team.

name: Port of Tauranga Limited
summary: Port of Tauranga Limited, a port company, provides and manages port services and cargo handling facilities through the Port of Tauranga and MetroPort in New Zealand. It operates through three segments: Port Operations, Property Services, and Marshalling Services. The company also manages and maintains various port properties. In addition, it provides contracted terminal operations, stevedoring, marshalling, and scaling activities. Further, the company provides wharf facilities; and berthage, cranes, tugs, and pilot services, as well as offers services for the storage and transit of import and export cargo. The company was founded in 1873 and is based in Tauranga, New Zealand. Port of Tauranga Limited is a subsidiary of Quayside Securities Limited.

name: Pushpay Holdings Limited
summary: Pushpay Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides donor management system to the faith sector, non-profit organizations, and education providers in the United States, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand. Its donor management system comprise donor tools, finance tools, and a custom community app. The company provides engagement, payments, and administration solutions, which enables its customers to enhance participation and build stronger relationships with their communities. It also offers Software as a Service church management system, a platform that provides churches to connect and communicate with their community members; record member service history; and track online giving and perform a range of administrative functions. Pushpay Holdings Limited was founded in 2011 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Plexure Group Limited
summary: Plexure Group Limited develops and deploys mobile engagement software primarily for use in quick service restaurants, and fuel and convenience stores. It offers cloud-based customer relationship management solutions that enables retailers to engage with consumers in real time using connected devices and sensors. The company also engages in trading activities; holds IP assets; and provides consulting services. It principally operates in Asia, Australasia, North America, Latin America, and Europe. The company was formerly known as VMob Group Limited and changed its name to Plexure Group Limited in July 2016. Plexure Group Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: PaySauce Limited
summary: PaySauce Limited provides cloud based employment solutions software to small and medium-sized businesses in New Zealand. It offers mobile timesheets, payroll calculations, banking integration, PAYE filing, labor costing, automated general ledger entries, and digital employment contract services. The company also provides management consulting services. It serves forestry, horticulture, SMEs, retail and service, and tech companies, as well as manufacturers, farmers, traders, charities, and accountants. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Lower Hutt, New Zealand.

name: Radius Residential Care Limited
summary: Radius Residential Care Limited provides health and aged care services for elderly and disabled people in New Zealand. It offers residential, hospital, dementia, respite, and palliative care services. The company also provides rest home and private hospital care services; walking sticks, wheelchairs, rehabilitation chairs, etc. through online shop; and bedroom and bathroom equipment, such as bed protectors and shower aids. It operates 22 aged care facilities in New Zealand, including approximately 1,700 Care Beds. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Rakon Limited
summary: Rakon Limited, together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and sells frequency control products for various applications in Asia, North America, Europe, and internationally. The company provides crystal resonators, tuning fork crystals, standard SMD crystals, crystal oscillators, voltage control crystal oscillators and clock oscillators, temperature compensated crystal oscillators, oven controlled crystal oscillators, and oven controlled surface acoustic wave (SAW) oscillators. It also offers a range of crystal filters, including bandpass filters, notch/stop band filters, linear phase or constant group delay filters, phase and/or amplitude matching filters, and monolithic filters; and frequency multipliers. The company's products are used in telecommunications, global positioning, and space and defense, and other markets. In addition, it is involved in the provision of financing and marketing support services; and research and development activities. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Restaurant Brands New Zealand Limited
summary: Restaurant Brands New Zealand Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates quick service and takeaway restaurants in New Zealand, Australia, California, Hawaii, Saipan, and Guam. The company operates the KFC, Pizza Hut, Carl's Jr., and Taco Bell brands in New Zealand; the KFC brand in Australia and California; and the Taco Bell and Pizza Hut brands in Hawaii, Guam, and Saipan. As of September 22, 2020, it operated 353 stores, including 101 KFC stores in New Zealand, 62 KFC stores in Australia, 37 Taco Bell stores in Hawaii, 2 Taco Bell stores in New Zealand, 2 Taco Bell stores in Australia, 24 Pizza Hut stores in New Zealand, 38 Pizza Hut stores in Hawaii, 69 KFC stores in California, and 18 Carl's Jr. stores in New Zealand stores. Restaurant Brands New Zealand Limited was founded in 1997 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Rua Bioscience Limited
summary: Rua Bioscience Limited, a pharmaceutical company, focuses on the research, cultivation, extraction, and manufacturing parts of the medicinal cannabis supply chain in New Zealand. It also exports bioactive extracts and products internationally. Rua Bioscience Limited has research and commercial partnerships with Crown Research Institutes and Universities Collaboration; Medical Research Institute of New Zealand; and Plant and Food New Zealand. The company was formerly known as Hikurangi Cannabis Company Limited and changed its name to Rua Bioscience Limited in October 2019. Rua Bioscience Limited was founded in 2016 and is based in Gisborne, New Zealand.

name: Ryman Healthcare Limited
summary: Ryman Healthcare Limited develops, owns, and operates integrated retirement villages, rest homes, and hospitals for the elderly in New Zealand and Australia. Its villages offer a range of retirement living and care options, such as independent townhouses and apartments, and serviced apartments, as well as a care center, which provides rest homes, hospitals, dementia level care, and respite and day care services. The company's villages also offer lounges and bar, indoor swimming pool and spa, gym, beauty salon, bowling green, library, internet caf√É¬©, movie theatre, and other facilities. Ryman Healthcare Limited was founded in 1984 and is based in Christchurch, New Zealand.

name: Sanford Limited
summary: Sanford Limited engages in farming, harvesting, processing, storing, and marketing of seafood products. It operates through Wildcatch and Aquaculture segments. The company catches and processes inshore and deepwater fish species, as well as farms, harvests, and processes mussels and salmon. Its seafood products include antarctic toothfish, arrow squid, barracouta, blue mackerel, gemfish, ghost shark, greenshell mussels, hake, hapuku, hoki, jack mackerel, john dory, kahawai, king salmon, lemon sole, ling, monkfish, new zealand sole, orange roughy, patagonian toothfish, red cod, scampi, silver warehou, smooth oreo dory, snapper, southern blue whiting, trevally, and yellowbelly flounder. The company also provides auction, wharf, and research services; and retails and wholesales seafood. It operates in New Zealand and Australia; Europe; North America; Japan, China, Hong Kong, South Korea, and the rest of Asia; Africa; the Middle East; the Pacific; and Central and South America. Sanford Limited was founded in 1881 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Scales Corporation Limited
summary: Scales Corporation Limited engages in the agribusiness activities in New Zealand. The company operates through Food Ingredients, Horticulture, and Logistics segments. The Food Ingredients segment processes and markets food ingredients, such as pet food ingredients and juice concentrates. This segment also manufactures and sells apple, kiwifruit, and pear juice concentrates. The Horticulture segment is involved in growing, packaging, marketing, and exporting apples under the Mr Apple, Fern Ridge Fresh, Dazzle, and Posy brands. The Logistics segment provides supply chain services for exporters, importers, and FMCG businesses. This segment also engages in the sea and air freight of produce. It also provides insurance services. The company was founded in 1897 and is headquartered in Christchurch, New Zealand.

name: Scott Technology Limited
summary: Scott Technology Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, sells, and services automated and robotic production lines, and processes for various industries in New Zealand and internationally. The company operates through Australasia Manufacturing, Americas Manufacturing, Europe Manufacturing and China Manufacturing segments. The company manufactures and sells automated laboratory sampling equipment for the mining industry; high temperature superconductor equipment; patented centrifuge technology for the honey and fish processing industries; automated guided vehicles under the Transbotics brand; band-saw machines under the BladeStop brand; and x-ray and sorting technology, as well as offers robot systems under the RobotWorx brand. It also offers industrial services and systems, which includes conventional and robot palletisers, depalletisers, pallet conveyors, case conveyors, and order preparation systems with stacker cranes and other material handling equipment, as well as software package Maestro+ under the Alvey brand name; and automated heavy gauge precision metal stamping equipment under the DC Ross brand. In addition, the company provides cryogen-free electromagnetic products, such as solenoids, current leads, coils, magnets, current systems, and magnetic resonance systems under the HTS-110 brand name; and sample preparation equipment under the ROCKLABS brand. It serves appliances, materials handling and logistics, meat processing, mining, and other industrial automation industries. Scott Technology Limited was founded in 1913 and is based in Dunedin, New Zealand.

name: Solution Dynamics Limited
summary: Solution Dynamics Limited provides customer communication solutions in New Zealand, Australia, Europe, and the United States. The company offers advanced digital asset management solutions, which combine a central repository to store, manage, and access brand assets, as well as associated accurate brand and product information together with integrated publishing applications; and communications content generation solutions, such as communication content generation workflows, digital asset and smart document ingestion, smart template ingestion, advanced database driven templates, online preview, multi-language capabilities, approval workflows, and advanced user rights management. It also provides automated workflows for communications personalization; content personalization and automated workflows for printed mail, email, and SMS; smart document and data driven templates; online preview and approval workflows; automated workflows for dispatch of personalized communications; automated workflows to effect print and mail house services; and access to print and mail house, database cleansing workflow, and bulk mail rates. In addition, the company offers communication logistics solutions comprising outbound and inbound communications management, high volume document scanning and data capture, conversion of file from paper to digital and bulk ingestion, meta-data tagging automation, managing sensitive and time critical documents, and outsourced digital archiving and document management; and post on demand solutions, such as access to self-service delivery portal, and drag and drop workflows, as well as automated postal mail, email and SMS workflows. Further, it provides print management, mail house and fulfilment, communications database cleansing, direct and transactional marketing, and business process and IT consultancy services, as well as API driven customer communication software. Solution Dynamics Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Seeka Limited
summary: Seeka Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides orchard lease and management, and post harvest services to the horticulture industry primarily in New Zealand. It operates through Orchard Operations, Post Harvest Operations, and Retail Service Operations segments. The Orchard Operations segment offers on-orchard management services to orchard owners who produce kiwifruit, avocado, and kiwiberry crops. The Post Harvest Operations segment provides post-harvest services to the kiwifruit, avocado, and kiwiberry industries that include crops from the company's orchard management and lease operations, as well as crops from independent orchard owners. The Retail Service Operations segment offers fruit marketing services; and retail and ripening services for imported fruit produce, and operates a wholesale market. It also produces and sells apricots, avocado, cherries, European pears, kiwiberry, kiwifruit, nashi pears, plums, bananas, pineapple, and organics, as well as kiwi crush, kiwi crushies, and avocado oil to the retail sector and hospitals. The company was formerly known as Seeka Kiwifruit Industries Limited and changed its name to Seeka Limited in October 2016. Seeka Limited was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Te Puke, New Zealand.

name: SkyCity Entertainment Group Limited
summary: SkyCity Entertainment Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates in the gaming, entertainment, hotel, convention, hospitality, and tourism sectors in New Zealand and Australia. It operates through Skycity Auckland, Other New Zealand Operations, SkyCity Adelaide, and International Business segments. The company engages in the hotels and convention, food and beverage, car parking, sky tower, property investment, and other related activities. It also operates casinos in Auckland, Hamilton, Queenstown, and Wharf, New Zealand; and Adelaide, Australia, as well as various restaurants, bars, and conference facilities. As of June 30, 2020, the company operated 273 table games, 3,204 electronic gaming machines, 307 automated table games, 19 restaurants, 14 bars, and 635 hotel rooms. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Skellerup Holdings Limited
summary: Skellerup Holdings Limited manufactures, markets, and distributes technical polymer and elastomer products for various specialist industrial and agricultural applications. It operates through Agri and Industrial segments. The company offers food grade dairy rubberware, including liners and tubing products, and rubber footwear for agricultural applications; milk filters; milk liners, tubing, and accessories; feeding teats; dairy vacuum pumps; and dairy hygiene and livestock health management products, as well as mastitis prevention and mastitis detection equipment. It also provides sealing and waterproofing products for roofing, plumbing, and civil/underground applications; pipe seals, diaphragms, washers, gaskets, customized rubber moldings, check valves, O rings, disks, and other components for use in automotive, industrial, mining pipe, valve, and medical industries; high precision rubber and plastic components for the automotive, flow control, appliance, and industrial markets; and fabric reinforced diaphragms, and rubber metal seat valves and injector components. In addition, the company offers EVA, PE, and various blended foams for marine, sports, leisure, orthotic, and construction applications; foam and soft material products; and live wall systems for installation in new and existing chutes. It operates primarily in New Zealand, Australia, North America, the United Kingdom, Ireland, rest of Europe, Asia, and internationally. Skellerup Holdings Limited was founded in 1910 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Serko Limited
summary: Serko Limited, a Software-as-a-Service technology business, provides computer software solutions for online travel bookings and expense management in New Zealand, Australia, North America, and internationally. The company offers Zeno Travel, an online booking tool that corporate travelers use to book flights, trains, hotels, rental cars, and airport transfers in line with their corporate travel policies; and Zeno Expense, which automates the process of corporate card and out-of-pocket expense submission, reconciliation, and reimbursement. It also provides Serko mobile, a mobile app for iPhones and android devices that gives users access to information and travel booking functionality on their mobile devices. The company sells and delivers its products through a network of travel management companies. Serko Limited was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: SKY Network Television Limited
summary: SKY Network Television Limited, an entertainment company, provides sport and entertainment media services, and telecommunications services in New Zealand. It offers commercial music, broadband, entertainment quizzes, advertising, and streaming services, as well as broadcasting services. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Synlait Milk Limited
summary: Synlait Milk Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells dairy products in China, rest of Asia, the Middle East, Africa, New Zealand, Australia, and internationally. The company is also involved in the processing, packaging, and marketing of dairy products, including cheese, butter, ice cream, and milk powder under the Alpine, Rolling, Meadow, Dairyworks, and Deep South brands. It offers liquid milk; milk powder related products; nutritional products, such as infant and adult nutritional powders; ingredients comprising skim milk powders and anhydrous milk fat; and specialized nutritional ingredients, such as lactoferrin. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Rakaia, New Zealand.

name: SML 17/12/2024 3.83% Synlait Mi
summary: SML 17/12/2024 3.83% Synlait Milk Bond refers to a specific bond issued by Synlait Milk Limited, maturing on December 17, 2024, with a coupon rate of 3.83%. It is a fixed-income security traded in the New Zealand market. Synlait Milk is a dairy processing company.

name: SMW Group Limited
summary: SMW Group Limited provides solutions for mining, rail, and defence sectors in Australia. It provides various field and workshop maintenance services; and designs, engineers, fabricates, and services heavy equipment. The company also engages in rail wagon repairs; and manufactures rail wagon doors, metal rail sleepers, and other components. SMW Group Limited is headquartered in Rockhampton, Australia.

name: SPF 07/09/26 3.94% - Spark Fina
summary: SPF 07/09/26 3.94% - Spark Finance is a fixed income security issued by Spark Finance. It represents a debt obligation with a specified interest rate and maturity date. Spark Finance is likely associated with Spark New Zealand.

name: SPF 07/03/2024 3.37% Spark Fina
summary: SPF 07/03/2024 3.37% Spark Finance is a fixed income security issued by Spark Finance. It represents a debt obligation with a specified interest rate and maturity date. Spark Finance is likely associated with Spark New Zealand.

name: Stride Stapled Group
summary: Stride Stapled Group is a real estate investment firm specializing in co-investments and investments in commercial, retail, and industrial real estate properties. Investment properties comprise of freehold land, leasehold land, buildings and improvements that are held either to earn rental income or for capital appreciation or both. It seeks to invest in New Zealand. Stride Stapled Group is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Spark New Zealand Limited
summary: Spark New Zealand Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides telecommunications and digital services in New Zealand. It offers telecommunications, information technology, media, and other digital products and services, including mobile services; voice services; broadband services; Internet TV; cloud, security, and service management services; procurement and partner services; and managed data and networks services. The company also offers IT infrastructure, business and outsourced telecommunications, subscription video-on-demand, big data analytics and marketing automation, data center, and international wholesale telecommunications services. In addition, it provides local, national, and international telephone and data services; group insurance products; and mobile phone repair services. Further, the company retails telecommunications products and services; and distributes equipment. The company was formerly known as Telecom Corporation of New Zealand Limited and changed its name to Spark New Zealand Limited in August 2014. Spark New Zealand Limited was founded in 1987 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: South Port New Zealand Limited
summary: South Port New Zealand Limited provides and manages port and warehousing services in New Zealand. It operates the Port of Bluff in the province of Southland. The company offers pilotage, towage, berthage, and full marine services to international and coastal vessels, including southern fishing fleet. It also provides full container, break bulk, and bulk cargo services for the import of alumina, petroleum products, fertilizers, acids, stock foods, and cement products; and the export of aluminum, timber, logs, dairy, meat by-products, fishes, and woodchips. In addition, the company offers container tracking services; dry warehousing services for a range of industries, including dairy, forestry, stock feed, and general cargo; cold stores for chilled and frozen products; and open storage facilities for logs, containers, woodchips, sawn timber, steel, and others. Further, it handles project cargo, such as transformer weighing, wind farm material, hydroelectric power station tail race equipment, mining equipment, and tanks for tallow storage, as well as a range of machinery, including pleasure and fishing vessels. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Bluff, New Zealand.

name: Smartpay Holdings Limited
summary: Smartpay Holdings Limited designs, develops, and implements technology products, services, and software to merchants and retailers in New Zealand and Australia. It provides payment and data management solutions for retail, business payment, and transactional processing requirements. The company also engages in selling Eftpos terminals; and provides hardware, software, and maintenance and repairs services. The company serves 25,000 merchants with approximately 35,000 EFTPOS terminals. It serves retail, trade, taxi and transport, charities and schools, hospitality, and tourism industries. The company was incorporated in 1986 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Steel & Tube Holdings Limited
summary: Steel & Tube Holdings Limited provides steel products, services, and solutions in New Zealand. The company offers structural steel, bar and plate products, and hollow steel sections; pipe and cable support products that include clip pipes, cables, and wire suspension systems; and stainless steel products, such as coils, sheets, plates, pipes, hygienic tube and associated fittings, and various structural bars, handrails, and architectural products to large scale projects and to the stainless steel fabricators, major corporations, and businesses in the construction, diary, water, food processing, energy, and manufacturing sectors. It also provides architectural stainless steel and other metals; chain and rigging services and solutions; pipes, valves, and fittings for petrochemical, power generation, mining, irrigation, fire protection, building services, and water and wastewater industries; profile metal roofing, cladding, and rainwater products; HST purlins and top hats; and fastening solutions for construction, manufacturing, general engineering, and fabrication sectors. In addition, the company offers fabricated reinforcing steel meshes, bars, ties, piles, beams, and columns for use in building and construction industry; engineered reinforcing solutions; composite floor decks; industrial consumable products, such as grinding discs and cut off wheels, adhesives and sealants, drills and drill sets, CRC and ROCOL, and industrial tools; galvanised, hot- and cold-rolled, aluminised, enameled, and colorsteel sheet and coil solutions; and reinforcing, fencing, fence panels, wire, gates, and nail products for use in agricultural, horticultural, and viticultural industries, as well as rural construction sector. Steel & Tube Holdings Limited was founded in 1953 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Summerset Group Holdings Limited
summary: Summerset Group Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops, owns, and operates integrated retirement villages in New Zealand. It provides independent living, care centers with rest home, and hospital-level care and memory care centers, as well as rest home care, and respite and short-term care services. The company also owns land for development of retirement villages in Australia It develops and operates 32 retirement villages for approximately 6,200 residents. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Wellington, New Zealand. Summerset Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of New Zealand Central Securities Depository Limited.

name: Summerset Group Holdings Limited 4.78% GTD SNR BDS 11/07/2023 NZD5000
summary: SUM010.NZ represents a debt security issued by Summerset Group Holdings Limited, a retirement village operator in New Zealand; it is a guaranteed senior bond with a fixed interest rate of 4.78% and is due to mature on 11/07/2023; the bond has a face value of NZD5000.

name: SUM 24/09/2025 4.20% Summerset
summary: SUM020.NZ is a debt security issued by Summerset Group Holdings Limited, a New Zealand-based retirement village operator; this is a bond with a 4.20% interest rate, maturing on September 24, 2025; the security represents debt financing for the company's operations and expansion.

name: SUM 21/09/2027 2.30% Summerset
summary: SUM030.NZ is a debt security issued by Summerset Group Holdings Limited, a retirement village operator in New Zealand; it's a bond paying a 2.30% interest rate and will mature on September 21, 2027; this bond represents a portion of the company's financing used to support its business activities.

name: Savor Limited
summary: Savor Limited operates in the hospitality sector in New Zealand. It operates restaurants and bars. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Third Age Health Services Limited
summary: Third Age Health Services Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides managed health care services for aged residential care facilities, private hospitals, and secure dementia facilities. The company was formerly known as Medplace Limited and changed its name to Third Age Health Services Limited in April 2011. Third Age Health Services Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Napier, New Zealand.

name: The City of London Investment Trust plc
summary: The City of London Investment Trust PLC is an investment trust that invests in emerging market equities. The trust aims to provide long-term capital growth. The company is based in the United Kingdom.

name: Templeton Emerging Markets Investment Trust plc
summary: Templeton Emerging Markets Investment Trust plc is an investment trust that aims to provide long-term capital appreciation by investing in emerging markets globally. The trust invests in a diversified portfolio of companies located in or doing significant business in emerging market countries. The company is based in the United Kingdom.

name: T&G Global Limited
summary: T&G Global Limited, together with its subsidiaries, grows, markets, distributes, and exports fresh produce under the JAZZ, envy, enza, pacific rose, LOTATOES, sunfirst, BEEKIST, and ORCHARD RD brands. It operates through Apples, International Produce, New Zealand Produce, Processed Foods, and Other segments. The company offers apples, pears, grapes, kiwifruit, asparagus, and tomatoes; citrus products, including lemons, mandarins, navel oranges, limes, grapefruit, and tangelos; cherries; blueberries, strawberries, and kiwi berries; and other stone fruits, as well as potatoes and other produce. It also cool stores and packs apples; sells, trades in, and markets processed foods; and engages in the horticulture, fruit and produce wholesale distribution, and fruit variety development and propagation activities. In addition, the company is involved in the processed foods broking, captive insurance provision, leased property holding, and water supply businesses, as well as the provision of in-market and fruit import and shared services. It sells its fresh produce in approximately 60 countries. The company was formerly known as Turners & Growers Limited and changed its name to T&G Global Limited in May 2015. The company was founded in 1883 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand. T&G Global Limited is a subsidiary of BayWa Aktiengesellschaft.

name: Tourism Holdings Limited
summary: Tourism Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a tourism company in Australia, New Zealand, and the United States. The company operates through New Zealand Rentals, New Zealand Tourism Group, Australia Rentals, and United States Rentals segments. It engages in the design, manufacture, rental, and sale of motor homes, campervans, caravans, 4WD vehicles, and RV accessories; and other tourism related activities. The company offers its vehicles under the Maui, Britz, and Mighty rental brands, as well as owns and operates the Road Bear RV, Just Go, El Monte RV, and Mighway rentals and sales brands. It also operates hop on and hop off guided buses under the Kiwi Experience name; operates Waitomo Glowworm caves, Ruakuri caves, and Aranui caves; provides water rafting in the subterranean rivers that flow through the Ruakuri cave system; and operates Waitomo Homestead, a refurbished restaurant. The company was formerly known as The Helicopter Line and changed its name to Tourism Holdings Limited in 1996. Tourism Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: TIL Logistics Group Limited
summary: TIL Logistics Group Limited operates as a freight and logistics company in New Zealand. It operates through International, Specialist, Freighting, Warehousing & Logistics, and Bulk Liquids segments. The company offers international freight forwarding services for the oil and gas industry; shipping agency services; transport and lifting solutions for oversized and large items, as well as advisory services; freight transport; warehousing and supply chain solutions; and delivery of various bulk liquid goods. It also provides heavy haulage, container transport, shipping, storage and distribution, and household removals and storage services. In addition, the company offers custom clearance work, port services, ship husbandry, crew matters, tank cleaning, and various services for importers/exporters, as well as asset leasing services. It owns and operates a fleet of approximately 2,300 trucks, trailers, forklifts, and light vehicles, as well as petroleum product dangerous goods road tanker fleets under the Pacific Fuel Haul brand name. The company is headquartered in New Plymouth, New Zealand.

name: Telstra Corporation Limited
summary: Telstra Corporation Limited provides telecommunications and information services to businesses, governments, and individuals in Australia and internationally. It operates in four segments: Telstra Consumer and Small Business, Telstra Enterprise, Networks and IT, and Telstra InfraCo. The company offers telecommunication products, services, and solutions across mobiles, fixed and mobile broadband, telephony and Pay TV/IPTV, and digital content; and online self-service capabilities, as well as operates inbound and outbound call centers, owned and licensed Telstra shops, and the Telstra dealership network. It also provides sales and contract management; and product management services for data and Internet protocol networks, mobility services, and network applications and services products, such as managed network, unified communications, cloud, industry solutions, and integrated services and monitoring. In addition, the company engages in the development of industry vertical solutions; planning, design, engineering architecture, and construction of Telstra networks, technology, and information technology solutions; and delivering network technologies. Further, it provides telecommunication products and services through its networks and related support systems to other carriers, carriage service providers, and Internet service providers; access to fixed network infrastructure assets; disconnection services; and network services under the Infrastructure Services Agreement and commercial contracts, as well as holds fixed network infrastructure, including data centers, non-mobiles related domestic fiber, copper, HFC cable, international subsea cables, exchanges, poles, ducts, and pipes. The company was formerly known as Australian and Overseas Telecommunications Corporation Limited and changed its name to Telstra Corporation Limited in April 1993. Telstra Corporation Limited was founded in 1901 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.

name: Tilt Renewables Limited
summary: Tilt Renewables Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops, owns, and manages renewable energy generation assets. The company operates in two segments, Australian Generation and New Zealand Generation. It generates electricity from renewable energy sources, such as wind and solar energy. As of March 31, 2020, the company operated 266 MW of wind generation assets in Australia and 196 MW of wind generation assets in New Zealand. It also offers financial services; and trades in electricity and associated products from renewable energy sources. The company has strategic partnership with Genesis Energy. Tilt Renewables Limited was incorporated in 2016 is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia. Tilt Renewables Limited is a subsidiary of Infratil Limited.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: Smartshares - NZ Top 10 ETF
summary: NZX 10 Fund is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by Smartshares Limited. It invests in the public equity markets of New Zealand. The fund invests in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. It invests in the stocks of large-cap companies. The fund replicates the performance of the S&P/NZX 10 Index, by investing in stocks of companies as per their weightings in the index. NZX 10 Fund was formed on May 7, 1996 and is domiciled in New Zealand.

name: Trustpower Limited
summary: Trustpower Limited engages in the development, ownership, and operation of electricity generation facilities in New Zealand. It operates through Generation and Retail segments. The company is also involved in the retail sale of electricity and gas; and provision of telecommunications services, which include wireless broadband and mobile services to homes and businesses. As of November 5, 2020, it operated approximately 263,000 electricity customer connections, 42,000 gas customer connections, and 106,500 telecommunications customer connections, as well as owned 25 hydropower schemes with a total installed capacity of 495 megawatts. The company was founded in 1915 and is based in Tauranga, New Zealand. Trustpower Limited is a subsidiary of Infratil Limited.
industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers

name: Turners Automotive Group Limited
summary: Turners Automotive Group Limited engages in the automotive retail business in New Zealand and Australia. It operates through five segments: Automotive Retail, Finance, Credit Management, Insurance, and Corporate & Other. The company buys and sells second hand cars, trucks, machinery, and commercial goods under the Turners and Buy Right Cars brand names. It also provides financial solutions for personal, vehicle, and small to medium business customers under the Oxford Finance brand; and underwrites and distributes a range of life and non-life consumer insurance products under the Autosure and Greenwich Life Insurance brands. In addition, the company offers automotive-owner protection insurance policies for the retail motor vehicle industry through various dealers under the Autosure brand; and debt collection, credit management and reporting, and terms of trade documentation services to the SME market under the EC Credit Control brand. Further, it is involved in trustee and auction businesses. The company was formerly known as Turners Limited and changed its name to Turners Automotive Group Limited in May 2017. Turners Automotive Group Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: TruScreen Group Limited
summary: Truscreen Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells cancer detection devices and systems in New Zealand and internationally. The company offers the TruScreen cervical cancer screening system, a medical device for detecting the presence of precancerous and cancerous tissue on the cervix in real time. The company was formerly known as TruScreen Limited and changed its name to Truscreen Group Limited in August 2020. Truscreen Group Limited was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Tower Limited
summary: Tower Limited provides general insurance products in New Zealand and the Pacific Islands. Its insurance products include car, contents, renters', house, landlord, business, travel, boat, motorbike, lifestyle block and farm, motorhome, and caravan or trailer insurance. The company was founded in 1869 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Vector Limited
summary: Vector Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in electricity and gas distribution, natural gas and LPG sale, gas processing, metering, and telecommunication and new energy businesses in New Zealand. It operates through three segments: Regulated Networks, Gas Trading, and Metering. The company distributes electricity to residential and commercial customers in Auckland, from Wellsford to Papakura through its network consisting of approximately 18,000 kilometers of overhead lines and underground cables; natural gas to customers; bulk LPG to commercial customers; and bottled LPG to commercial and residential customers. It also provides Vector solar systems; electricity and gas metering services to approximately 2,000,000 homes and businesses; and designs, builds, and supports fiber network solutions that connect buildings in Auckland. In addition, the company offers electric vehicle charging station app; bulk LPG storage, distribution, and management services; and ventilation, heating, and water systems and related assembly services. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand. Vector Limited is a subsidiary of Entrust.

name: Vector Limited

summary: VCT 27/05/25 3.45% Vector Limit is a fixed-income security issued by Vector Limited, a New Zealand infrastructure company. It represents a debt obligation with a specified interest rate and maturity date. This security provides investors with a fixed return over its term.

name: Vista Group International Limited
summary: Vista Group International Limited engages in the development, sale, and support of software solutions to the film industry worldwide. The company operates through Cinema, Movio, and Additional Group Companies segments. It offers Vista Cinema, a cinema management software for cinema exhibitors in the large circuit market; and Veezi, a cloud-based software as a service cinema management software for cinema exhibitors in the small circuit market. The company also provides Movio, a cloud-based solution that maintains real-time data on customer transactions for cinema chains; and MACCS, a multiple-module software that offers theatrical distribution, movie prints, and advertising services, as well as rights and royalties management services. In addition, it offers Powster, a studio that provides creative services to the film and music industry, as well as creates products to help users engage with entertainment content; Flicks, an authoritative guide for cinemas; Numero, box office tracking and reporting software for film distributors and cinemas; and Cinema Intelligence and movieXchange solutions. Further, the company provides software licensing; Web platform development and licensing; and online loyalty, data analytics, and marketing services. Vista Group International Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Vital Healthcare Property Trust
summary: Vital Healthcare Property Trust is a real estate investment trust externally managed by Vital Healthcare Management Limited. The firm investments in health and medical related properties in New Zealand and Australia. It undertakes acquisition or development of medical or healthcare-related properties such as surgical and medical facilities, geriatric and continuing care facilities primary healthcare facilities, and health support facilities. The fund may invest in conjunction with other health service providers. It was formerly known as ING Medical Properties Trust and Calan Healthcare Properties Trust.

name: Vital Limited
summary: Vital Limited provides mobile radio networks and high speed broadband services in New Zealand. The company operates in two segments, Wireless Networks and Wired Networks. It offers fibre and Ethernet solutions; and broadband connectivity and ancillary related services to a range of wholesale customers and end users. The company also provides data and GPS tracking products, as well as finance leasing services. It serves government, civil defense, emergency service, health, utility, public transport, education, logistics and freight, agriculture, and channel partner customers. The company was formerly known as TeamTalk Limited and changed its name to Vital Limited in July 2019. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Wellington, New Zealand.

name: Westpac Banking Corporation
summary: Westpac Banking Corporation provides various banking and financial services in Australia, New Zealand, and internationally. The company operates through four divisions: Consumer, Business, Westpac Institutional Bank, Westpac New Zealand, Specialist Businesses, and Group Businesses. It offers everyday banking, savings, term deposit, business transaction, foreign currency, and specialized accounts; home, personal, and business loans; credit cards; international and travel services; share trading services; investment; and home, car, travel, life, and business insurance products. The company also provides merchant and payment, corporate and institutional, transaction banking, financial market, corporate and structured finance, trade and supply chain financing, and industry specific banking and treasury services, as well as online banking services. It serves individuals; micro, small, and medium enterprises; commercial business and private wealth clients; and commercial, corporate, institutional, and government customers. The company was formerly known as Bank of New South Wales and changed its name to Westpac Banking Corporation in October 1982. The company was founded in 1817 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.

name: Westpac Banking Corporation
summary: Westpac Banking Corporation provides various banking and financial services in Australia, New Zealand, and internationally. The company operates through four divisions: Consumer, Business, Westpac Institutional Bank, Westpac New Zealand, Specialist Businesses, and Group Businesses. It offers everyday banking, savings, term deposit, business transaction, foreign currency, and specialized accounts; home, personal, and business loans; credit cards; international and travel services; share trading services; investment; and home, car, travel, life, and business insurance products. The company also provides merchant and payment, corporate and institutional, transaction banking, financial market, corporate and structured finance, trade and supply chain financing, and industry specific banking and treasury services, as well as online banking services. It serves individuals; micro, small, and medium enterprises; commercial business and private wealth clients; and commercial, corporate, institutional, and government customers. The company was founded in 1817 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.

name: Wellington Drive Technologies Limited
summary: Wellington Drive Technologies Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, markets, and sells energy saving and electronically commutated (EC) motors, controllers, and fans; and develops Internet of Things solutions and software worldwide. It offers ECR refrigeration fan motors, refrigeration fan assemblies, fractional horsepower ventilation fan motors, and AirMoVent shaded pole Q-motors; refrigeration control solutions, including Connect SCS range of products that are a family of intelligent electronic thermostats and energy management devices for commercial refrigeration systems; and SCS Connect System, a fleet management system for point of sale refrigeration equipment. The company also provides proximity marketing solutions comprising iPX Platform that connects customer's digital marketing efforts to SCS beacons or other proximity devices; Mobile Coupon Factory, which operates as an online agency that facilitates in the design, development, and deployment of integrated mobile marketing solutions; ScreenSmarts, which integrates with digital media screens to silently detect the presence of customers and interrupt normal sign content programming to display personalized contextual offers or information. Its products are used in supermarket and supermarket refrigeration, beverage merchandising, and food service applications. The company was formerly known as Cadac Limited and changed its name to Wellington Drive Technologies Limited in September 1996. Wellington Drive Technologies Limited was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: two
summary: two is a blank check company. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in San Francisco, California.

name: The Warehouse Group Limited
summary: The Warehouse Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the retail of general merchandise and apparel in New Zealand. It also sells stationery products, technology and appliance products, and sporting equipment. The company operates 93 The Warehouse stores, 70 Warehouse Stationery stores, 77 Noel Leeming stores, and 18 Torpedo7 stores, as well as online stores. In addition, it engages in the provision of financial, property, investment, and wholesale services. The Warehouse Group Limited was founded in 1982 and is based in Auckland, New Zealand.

name: Z Energy Limited
summary: Z Energy Limited sells transport fuel in New Zealand. It supplies fuel to retail customers, as well as commercial customers, such as airlines, trucking companies, shipping companies, and vehicle fleet operators, as well as supplies bitumen to roading contractors. The company also offers Z Business Plus, a fuel card for businesses to buy fuels. It owns and manages approximately 200 retail service stations; 151 truck stops; and pipelines, terminals, and bulk storage terminal infrastructure. The company was formerly known as Greenstone Energy Limited and changed its name to Z Energy Limited in May 2011. Z Energy Limited was incorporated in 1959 and is headquartered in Wellington, New Zealand.
